detectors.description:
Reentrancy in DAIKI._transfer(address,address,uint256) (DAIKI.sol#657-781):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (DAIKI.sol#721)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (DAIKI.sol#795-807)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (DAIKI.sol#727)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (DAIKI.sol#815)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (DAIKI.sol#779)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (DAIKI.sol#951)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (DAIKI.sol#931)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (DAIKI.sol#933)
	DAIKI._rOwned (DAIKI.sol#333) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- DAIKI._takeTeam(uint256) (DAIKI.sol#945-953)
	- DAIKI._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (DAIKI.sol#905-941)
	- DAIKI.balanceOf(address) (DAIKI.sol#483-487)
	- DAIKI.constructor() (DAIKI.sol#417-447)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (DAIKI.sol#779)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (DAIKI.sol#959)
	DAIKI._rTotal (DAIKI.sol#345) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- DAIKI._getCurrentSupply() (DAIKI.sol#1101-1111)
	- DAIKI._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (DAIKI.sol#957-963)
	- DAIKI.constructor() (DAIKI.sol#417-447)
	- DAIKI.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (DAIKI.sol#579-601)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [DAIKI._transfer(address,address,uint256)](DAIKI.sol#L657-L781):
	External calls:
	- [swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance)](DAIKI.sol#L721)
		- [uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp)](DAIKI.sol#L795-L807)
	External calls sending eth:
	- [sendETHToFee(address(this).balance)](DAIKI.sol#L727)
		- [_marketingAddress.transfer(amount)](DAIKI.sol#L815)
	State variables written after the call(s):

		- [_rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam)](DAIKI.sol#L951)
		- [_rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount)](DAIKI.sol#L931)
		- [_rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount)](DAIKI.sol#L933)
	[DAIKI._rOwned](DAIKI.sol#L333) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [DAIKI._takeTeam(uint256)](DAIKI.sol#L945-L953)
	- [DAIKI._transferStandard(address,address,uint256)](DAIKI.sol#L905-L941)
	- [DAIKI.balanceOf(address)](DAIKI.sol#L483-L487)
	- [DAIKI.constructor()](DAIKI.sol#L417-L447)
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](DAIKI.sol#L779)
		- [_rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee)](DAIKI.sol#L959)
	[DAIKI._rTotal](DAIKI.sol#L345) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [DAIKI._getCurrentSupply()](DAIKI.sol#L1101-L1111)
	- [DAIKI._reflectFee(uint256,uint256)](DAIKI.sol#L957-L963)
	- [DAIKI.constructor()](DAIKI.sol#L417-L447)
	- [DAIKI.tokenFromReflection(uint256)](DAIKI.sol#L579-L601)
